from typing import Any


def update_user(user_id: int, data: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    data["updated_by"] = "system"
    data["updated_at"] = "2024-01-01"

    if not data.get("name"):
        raise ValueError("Name is required")

    return save_user(user_id, data)


def patch_order(order_id: int, patch: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    patch["status"] = "pending_review"

    if patch.get("amount", 0) < 0:
        raise ValueError("Amount cannot be negative")

    return save_order(order_id, patch)


def save_user(user_id, data):
    return {"id": user_id, **data}


def save_order(order_id, data):
    return {"id": order_id, **data}
